consit.about: Srirangam constituency is a significant urban and religious center in Tiruchirappalli district, Tamil Nadu, known for its economic importance and diverse population. The constituency includes parts of Tiruchirappalli city and surrounding areas, and it is part of the Tiruchirappalli Lok Sabha constituency. Established in 1951, it has a rich political history with diverse representation over the decades.

problem.title: Water
problem.desc: Irregular drinking water supply and dependence on Cauvery leading to seasonal shortages and civic dissatisfaction

problem.title: Infrastructure
problem.desc: Poor road conditions and inadequate drainage systems causing flooding and mosquito-related health issues

problem.title: Sanitation
problem.desc: Stagnant sewage and ineffective waste management creating hygiene problems in residential areas

problem.title: Governance
problem.desc: Public frustration due to delayed response to grievances and lack of local administrative effectiveness

problem.title: Health
problem.desc: Frequent illness outbreaks due to poor sanitation and stagnant water conditions

problem.title: Infrastructure
problem.desc: Overcrowding and congestion during religious and tourist seasons affecting mobility

problem.title: Environment
problem.desc: Pollution in Cauvery river affecting ecosystem and water usability

problem.title: Employment
problem.desc: Seasonal employment linked to tourism with lack of stable income opportunities
